units.source_text: 友邦保險控股有限公司（「本公司」）於2009年8月24日在香港註冊成立為有限公司，其註冊辦事處地址為香港中環干諾道中1
units.translation_target_text: AIA Holdings Limited (the "Company") was incorporated as a limited liability company in Hong Kong on August 24, 2009. Its registered office address is 1 Connaught Road Central, Central, Hong Kong
units.translation_en: AIA Holdings Limited (the "Company") was incorporated as a limited liability company in Hong Kong on August 24, 2009. Its registered office address is 1 Connaught Road Central, Central, Hong Kong

units.source_text: 友邦保險控股有限公司於香港聯合交易所有限公司主板上市（股份代號為「1299」）；其美國預託證券（一級）於場外交易市場
units.translation_target_text: AIA Holdings Limited is listed on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited (stock code: "1299"); its American Depositary Receipts (Level 1) are traded on the OTC market
units.translation_en: AIA Holdings Limited is listed on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited (stock code: "1299"); its American Depositary Receipts (Level 1) are traded on the OTC market
